name: kernel-sdks
description: TypeScript and Python SDK skills for building browser automation with Kernel

interface.shortDescription: Build cloud browser automations with the Kernel TypeScript and Python SDKs
interface.longDescription: Installs Kernel TypeScript and Python SDK skills for creating cloud browser sessions, connecting with Playwright, and building browser automation scripts.
defaultPrompt: Use the Kernel TypeScript SDK to build a browser automation.
Use the Kernel Python SDK with Playwright to automate a website.
